description: AI Agent Configuration with JavaScript Actions

actions.name: get_response_time
actions.description: Returns the response time of a website in seconds.

actions.name: get_site_health
actions.description: Gets overall health status of a website by checking response time and availability.

actions.name: fetch_json
actions.description: Fetches JSON data from a full URL or using a base resource.

parameters.endpoint: The full URL or relative path
parameters.base_key: Optional: which web_resource to use as base (e.g., 'json_placeholder')

actions.name: fetch_and_process_user
actions.description: Fetches a user from jsonplaceholder and returns their name and email.

parameters.user_id: The ID of the user to fetch (e.g., 1, 2, 3)
